name: delete_qor_suggestions
short_description: Deletes a list of available QoR suggestions
full_help:
delete_qor_suggestions

Description: 
Deletes a list of available QoR suggestions

Syntax: 
delete_qor_suggestions  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<IDs>]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<IDs>]     Match suggestion names against given names

Categories: 
Object, Feasibility, Timing

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
